# pdf-lib (vendored browser ESM)

Pinned version: **1.17.1**

Source: `node_modules/pdf-lib` (`npm install pdf-lib@1.17.1`)

## Browser usage

```js
import { PDFDocument } from "/assets/vendor/pdf-lib/pdf-lib.esm.min.js";
```

Do not edit these files by hand — re-copy from `node_modules/pdf-lib` after upgrading the pin.
